mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=FCT031#SQL001 */ A.CUSTOMER_ID , A.BUTEN_CODE , A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER , A.NAME_KANJI , A.NAME_KANA , A.TC_COMP_RANK , A.CUSTOMER_ATTRIBUTE , A.CUSTOMER_ATTRIBUTE_NAME , A.DEALER_NUMBER , A.BIRTH_DAY , A.AGE , A.BROKER_CODE , A.INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD , A.CORPORATION_KBN AS UAI_CORPORATION_KBN , A.UAI_PHONE_LONG_DIST , A.UAI_PHONE_CITY_CODE , A.UAI_PHONE_NUMBER , A.UAI_CELLULAR_NUMBER1 , A.UAI_CELLULAR_NUMBER2 , A.UAI_CELLULAR_NUMBER3 , A.UAI_DAIHYO_NAME_KANJI , A.UAI_DAIHYO_NAME_KANA , A.UAI_DAIRI_NAME_KANJI , A.UAI_DAIRI_NAME_KANA , A.UAI_OFFICE_DAIRI_KBN , NVL(A.UAI_SPECIFIC_KBN,' ') AS UAISPECIFICKBN , A.UAI_SPECIFIC_DIVIDEND_START_DT , A.UAI_SPECIFIC_DIVIDEND_END_DT , A.UAI_MARUYU_TEKIKAKUSHA_KBN , NVL(A.UAI_ISA_CONTRACT_KBN,' ') AS UAIISACONTRACTKBN , NVL(A.UAI_JNISA_CONTRACT_KBN,' ') AS UAIJNISACONTRACTKBN , A.UAI_JNISA_KOZA_NO , NVL(A.UAI_JNISA_SPECIFIC_KBN,' ') AS UAIJNISASPECIFICKBN , C.BRANCH_NAME AS BROKERNAME , D.BRANCH_NAME , D.BROKER_CHARGE_NAME , E.NOTEINFOERRORCOUNT , F.NOTEINFOCOUNT , G.UNREADIMPORTANTNOTICETRANSACTIONLIMITERRORNUMBER , H.UNREADIMPORTANTNOTICETRANSACTIONLIMITNUMBER FROM (SELECT * FROM MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO WHERE BUTEN_CODE = #{fct031Sql001RequestModel.butenCode} AND ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{fct031Sql001RequestModel.accountNumber}) ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN MEDIATE_BRANCH C ON A.BROKER_CODE = C.BROKER_CODE AND BROKER_BRANCH_KIND = '00' /* 「本店」 */ LEFT OUTER JOIN V_MEDIATE_CHARGE_INFO D ON A.BROKER_CODE = D.BROKER_CODE AND A.INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD = D.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT L.CUSTOMER_ID , COUNT(*) AS NOTEINFOERRORCOUNT FROM CALLCENTER.ATTENTION_INFO L , CALLCENTER.ATTENTION_CATEGORY_MASTER M , (SELECT DISTINCT(K.RESTRICT_CODE) FROM M_MED_TRADE_RESTRICT K WHERE K.RESTRICT_TYPE = '1' /* 「1：注意情報」 */ AND K.VALUE = '2' /* 「2：エラー」 */ AND START_DATE <= IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE AND IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE <= END_DATE) TMP WHERE L.CUSTOMER_ID = (SELECT CUSTOMER_ID FROM MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO WHERE BUTEN_CODE = #{fct031Sql001RequestModel.butenCode} AND ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{fct031Sql001RequestModel.accountNumber}) ) AND L.ON_OFF_FLG = '有効' AND L.DELETE_TIME IS NULL AND L.CATEGORY = M.CATEGORY_NAME AND M.CATEGORY_CD IN TMP.RESTRICT_CODE GROUP BY L.CUSTOMER_ID HAVING COUNT(TMP.RESTRICT_CODE) >= 1) E ON A.CUSTOMER_ID = E.CUSTOMER_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT N.CUSTOMER_ID , COUNT(N.CUSTOMER_ID) AS NOTEINFOCOUNT FROM CALLCENTER.ATTENTION_INFO N WHERE N.CUSTOMER_ID = (SELECT CUSTOMER_ID FROM MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO WHERE BUTEN_CODE = #{fct031Sql001RequestModel.butenCode} AND ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{fct031Sql001RequestModel.accountNumber}) ) AND N.ON_OFF_FLG = '有効' AND N.DELETE_TIME IS NULL GROUP BY N.CUSTOMER_ID) F ON A.CUSTOMER_ID = F.CUSTOMER_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT P.JUS_BUTEN_CODE , P.JUS_ACCOUNT_NUMBER , COUNT(*) AS UNREADIMPORTANTNOTICETRANSACTIONLIMITERRORNUMBER FROM JMSG_USER_STATUS P , (SELECT O.RESTRICT_CODE FROM M_MED_TRADE_RESTRICT O WHERE O.RESTRICT_TYPE = '2' /* 「2：未読の重要なお知らせによる取引制限」 */ AND O.VALUE = '2' /* 「2：エラー」 */ AND O.START_DATE <= IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE AND IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE <= O.END_DATE) TMP2 WHERE P.JUS_BUTEN_CODE = #{fct031Sql001RequestModel.butenCode} AND P.JUS_ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{fct031Sql001RequestModel.accountNumber}) AND P.JUS_CONFIRM_KBN = '0' /* 「0：未確認」 */ AND (P.JUS_RESTRAINT_DATE <= IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE OR P.JUS_RESTRAINT_DATE IS NULL) AND SUBSTR(P.JUS_RESTRAINT,TO_NUMBER(TRIM(TMP2.RESTRICT_CODE)),1) = '1' GROUP BY P.JUS_BUTEN_CODE, P.JUS_ACCOUNT_NUMBER HAVING COUNT(TMP2.RESTRICT_CODE) >= 1 ) G ON A.BUTEN_CODE = G.JUS_BUTEN_CODE AND A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = G.JUS_ACCOUNT_NUMBER LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT Q.JUS_BUTEN_CODE , Q.JUS_ACCOUNT_NUMBER , COUNT(*) AS UNREADIMPORTANTNOTICETRANSACTIONLIMITNUMBER FROM JMSG_USER_STATUS Q WHERE Q.JUS_BUTEN_CODE = #{fct031Sql001RequestModel.butenCode} AND Q.JUS_ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{fct031Sql001RequestModel.accountNumber}) AND Q.JUS_CONFIRM_KBN = '0' /* 「0：未確認」 */ AND (Q.JUS_RESTRAINT_DATE <= IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE OR Q.JUS_RESTRAINT_DATE IS NULL) GROUP BY Q.JUS_BUTEN_CODE, Q.JUS_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) H ON A.BUTEN_CODE = H.JUS_BUTEN_CODE AND A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = H.JUS_ACCOUNT_NUMBER
